---
title: ""
---

<style>
.hero a { 
  color: #b45373;
  text-decoration: none; 
  font-weight: 500;
}
.hero a:hover { 
  text-decoration: underline; 
}

.content a { 
  color: #b45373; 
  text-decoration: none; 
}
.content a:hover { 
  text-decoration: underline; 
}

.news li { 
  margin-bottom: 14px; 
}
</style>

<div class="hero" style="
  text-align: center;
  padding: 64px 20px 48px;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fdecef 0%, #ffffff 100%);
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f2cbd4;
  margin-bottom: 36px;
">

  <h1 style="margin-bottom: 8px;">Emily Roberts, PhD</h1>

  <h3 style="margin: 6px 0; font-weight: 500;">
    Assistant Professor of Biostatistics
  </h3>

  <p style="font-size: 1.05em; color: #555; margin-top: 6px;">
    University of Iowa · College of Public Health
  </p>

  <p style="
    margin: 22px auto 0;
    max-width: 700px;
    font-size: 1.1em;
    line-height: 1.6;
    color: #444;
  ">
    Statistical methodology for biomedical and public health research,
    with a focus on meaningful interdisciplinary collaboration.
  </p>

</div>

<div class="content" style="
  max-width: 780px;
  margin: 0 auto 48px;
  line-height: 1.65;
  font-size: 1.1em;
">

<p>
Hi! I am an 
<a href="https://www.public-health.uiowa.edu/people/emily-roberts/">
assistant professor of biostatistics at the University of Iowa</a>.
I enjoy developing statistical methodology that can be meaningfully applied
in clinical and public health settings.
</p>

<p>
I completed my PhD in Biostatistics at the 
<a href="https://sph.umich.edu/biostat/">University of Michigan</a> in 2022,
where my dissertation focused on
<em>Causal Inference Methods and Intermediate Endpoints in Randomized Clinical Trials</em>.
Previously, I graduated
Summa Cum Laude from Coe College
with a BA in mathematics and psychology.
</p>

<p>
I was diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes at the age of four,
and this continues to shape how I approach research,
teaching, and collaboration.
</p>

</div>

---

## Featured News & Stories

<div class="news" style="
  max-width: 760px; 
  margin: 0 auto; 
  font-size: 1.05em; 
  line-height: 1.6;
">

<ul>
  <li>
    <strong>Roberts to Lead University of Iowa Causal Inference Collaboratory</strong><br>
    <a href="https://www.public-health.uiowa.edu/news-items/roberts-to-lead-collaboratory-focused-on-causal-inference-research/">
      University of Iowa College of Public Health
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <strong>University of Iowa’s Meet the Faculty</strong><br>
    <a href="https://www.public-health.uiowa.edu/news-items/meet-our-faculty-emily-roberts/">
      College of Public Health
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <strong>Running Beyond Type One: My T1D and PhD Journey</strong><br>
    <a href="https://beyondtype1.org/nyc-marathon-phd-training-roberts/">
      Beyond Type 1
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <strong>Rackham Predoctoral Fellowship Recipient</strong><br>
    <a href="https://rackham.umich.edu/predoctoral-fellowship-celebration/">
      University of Michigan
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <strong>Kohawk Stories</strong><br>
    <a href="https://www.coe.edu/why-coe/kohawk-stories/emily-roberts">
      Coe College
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <strong>McElroy Fellowship</strong><br>
    <a href="https://www.mcelroytrust.org/success-stories">
      McElroy Trust
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    <strong>The Gazette</strong><br>
    <a href="https://www.thegazette.com/higher-education/coe-grad-receives-prestigious-fellowships/">
      News Story
    </a>
  </li>
</ul>

</div>
